user.title: Sonos Intercom
user.description: Set up Sonos Intercom. You can adjust defaults afterwards under Configure.

data.storage_dir: Storage folder for recordings (relative to config)
data.retention_hours: Auto-delete generated files older than (hours, 0 = never)
data.custom_chime_dir: Folder for custom chimes (under www/, relative to config)
data.quiet_max_volume: Max volume during quiet hours (0 = skip announcements)
data.history_size: Number of messages kept in history
